query:
CREATE TABLE `searchHistory` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int,
	`query` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`resultCount` int DEFAULT 0,
	`searchType` varchar(50),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `searchHistory_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `userCertificates` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`categoryId` int NOT NULL,
	`certificateCode` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`completedFlashcards` int NOT NULL,
	`totalFlashcards` int NOT NULL,
	`completionPercentage` int NOT NULL,
	`completedAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `userCertificates_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `userCertificates_certificateCode_unique` UNIQUE(`certificateCode`)
);

CREATE TABLE `searchHistory` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int,
	`query` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`resultCount` int DEFAULT 0,
	`searchType` varchar(50),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `searchHistory_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `userCertificates` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`categoryId` int NOT NULL,
	`certificateCode` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`completedFlashcards` int NOT NULL,
	`totalFlashcards` int NOT NULL,
	`completionPercentage` int NOT NULL,
	`completedAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `userCertificates_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `userCertificates_certificateCode_unique` UNIQUE(`certificateCode`)
);
